title: Bundle Scroll
description: Unlock the full potential of bundles by cycling through the contents of a bundle using the scroll wheel
body:
# Bundle Scroll

# ✅ Features
- **Select any Item** by scrolling up or down while hovering over a Bundle with the mouse
- **Grab any Item** as usual by right-clicking on a Bundle!
- **Creative Client-side**, usable in Creative even when the server doesn't have the mod 
- **Compatible with Vanilla Clients**, allowing only the server to have the mod installed
